category_sources: source_facts.description says Declarative secrets management tool; official site describes declaring secrets once and storing them in multiple providers.
display_name_sources: official repository README title is SecretSpec.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official dedicated documentation site; official README links to Documentation and Quick Start on secretspec.dev.

tags_sources: official site lists storage backends including keyring, 1Password, Vault/OpenBao, AWS, GCP, dotenv, and env.
